title: stachys pilosa subsp. hispida
intro: Stachys pilosa subsp. hispida, also known as hairy betony, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Stachys pilosa subsp. hispida include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues such as irritable bowel syndrome. Stachys pilosa subsp. hispida can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
